curatedFacts.founded: 1959 (city status), founded 1833, named after Sir Robert Barrie
curatedFacts.landmarks: Barrie Waterfront, Spirit Catcher sculpture, Simcoe County Museum, Sunnidale Park, Centennial Park
curatedFacts.notable: gateway to Ontario's 'Cottage Country' — located on Kempenfelt Bay of Lake Simcoe, one of Canada's fastest-growing cities
curatedFacts.economy: gateway to cottage country, healthcare (Royal Victoria Regional Health Centre), retail, light manufacturing, CFB Borden
curatedFacts.entityDesc: Barrie is a city in Grey-Bruce-Simcoe, Ontario, Canada, with a population of approximately 147,829. Gateway to cottage country, healthcare (royal victoria regional health centre), retail, light manufacturing, cfb borden.
curatedFacts.longDesc:
Barrie isn't just Ontario's city — it's a place where ambition meets opportunity. Founded founded 1833, named after Sir Robert Barrie, this city has transformed into a thriving community of over ~150,000 people.

What makes Barrie remarkable for {BUSINESS_TYPE}? Character and community. The city encompasses everything from stunning waterfront boardwalk, ski resorts nearby (Horseshoe, Snow Valley), Lake Simcoe recreation, Maclaren Art Centre. Each neighborhood has its own character, its own needs, and its own expectations.

The local economy is driven by gateway to cottage country, healthcare (Royal Victoria Regional Health Centre), retail, light manufacturing, CFB Borden. This economic foundation creates steady demand for services and supports a community that takes pride in maintaining its properties and infrastructure.

Community features include Barrie Waterfront, Spirit Catcher sculpture, Simcoe County Museum, Sunnidale Park, Centennial Park, which give Barrie its distinctive character.

Barrie benefits from its location in Grey-Bruce-Simcoe. Whether you need routine {SERVICE} maintenance or a major project, {COMPANY_NAME} understands what Barrie properties need. We've invested the time to learn this community — the local building codes, the weather patterns, the neighbourhood expectations. That's why Barrie residents keep choosing {COMPANY_NAME}.

Our promise: transparent pricing, professional execution, results that last. Call {PHONE} for your {ESTIMATE_TYPE} estimate today.
